hero.headline: Unleash Peak Performance.
hero.subheadline: Complete Men's Wellness Solution Designed For Performance, Stamina, Vitality & Confidence.

features.title: PERFORMANCE
features.desc: Amplify your physical performance and bedroom confidence with our clinically-inspired formula.

features.title: STAMINA
features.desc: Support lasting endurance and sustained energy levels through every challenge you face.

features.title: VITALITY
features.desc: Restore natural vitality, strengthen your body's core functions and feel alive every day.

features.title: CONFIDENCE
features.desc: Build unshakeable confidence backed by science, nature, and premium wellness standards.

products.name: Performance Oil
products.subtitle: Massage Oil to Enhance Performance
products.description: Premium massage oil infused with potent herbal extracts. Designed to improve blood circulation, enhance sensitivity, and maximize your performance naturally.
products.how_to_use: Apply 4-5 drops and massage gently for 5-10 minutes before activity.

products.name: Performance Capsules
products.subtitle: Stamina | Energy | Vitality
products.description: Advanced wellness capsules powered by Ayurvedic herbs. A complete internal formula to boost stamina, restore energy, and support long-term vitality.
products.how_to_use: Take 2 capsules daily with warm milk or water. Best taken after meals.

products.name: Power Laddu
products.subtitle: Natural Strength & Stamina Booster
products.description: Traditional Ayurvedic recipe modernized with premium herbal ingredients. Each laddu delivers concentrated strength, stamina, and energy support in a delicious form.
products.how_to_use: Consume 1 laddu daily in the morning with warm milk for best results.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.review: Power 69 is absolutely life-changing. Within 3 weeks, I felt like a completely different man. The energy levels, the confidence — everything improved dramatically. Best investment I've made for my health.

testimonials.name: Vikram Singh
testimonials.review: I was skeptical at first, but the results speak for themselves. The complete kit approach — oil, capsules, and laddu — is what makes it so effective. The packaging itself feels premium.

testimonials.name: Arjun Mehta
testimonials.review: Outstanding product. The Performance Oil works incredibly fast and the capsules gave me sustained energy throughout the day. My confidence is at an all-time high. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Suresh Patel
testimonials.review: The Power Laddu is something else entirely. Traditional taste, modern results. Combined with the capsules, I've seen a massive improvement in my overall wellness. 100% worth it.

testimonials.name: Karthik Reddy
testimonials.review: Tried many products before. Nothing compares to Power 69. The quality of ingredients is unmatched and customer service was excellent. Already on my second kit!

faqs.question: What is POWER 69 Men's Wellness Kit?
faqs.answer: POWER 69 is a comprehensive men's sexual wellness kit containing 3 premium products: Performance Oil (30ml), Performance Capsules (60 caps), and Power Laddu (10 pcs). Together, they provide a complete solution for performance, stamina, vitality, and confidence.

faqs.question: How soon will I see results?
faqs.answer: Most customers report feeling increased energy within the first week. Significant improvements in stamina and performance are typically noticed within 2-3 weeks of consistent use. For best results, complete a full 30-day cycle.

faqs.question: Are the ingredients safe and natural?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely. All ingredients in POWER 69 are 100% natural, Ayurvedic herbs sourced from certified farms. Our formula is free from synthetic chemicals, steroids, or harmful additives. It has been tested for purity and potency.

faqs.question: How do I use the complete kit?
faqs.answer: Use the Performance Oil externally by applying 4-5 drops and massaging gently for 5-10 minutes. Take 2 Performance Capsules daily with warm milk after meals. Consume 1 Power Laddu every morning with warm milk. Follow this routine consistently for best results.

faqs.question: Is POWER 69 suitable for all ages?
faqs.answer: POWER 69 is designed for adult men aged 18 and above. Men aged 30-60 tend to see the most significant results as the formula targets age-related wellness concerns. If you have any medical conditions, consult your physician before use.

faqs.question: What is the return and refund policy?
faqs.answer: We stand behind our product with a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied with your results, contact our customer support team within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. Your trust matters to us.

faqs.question: How is POWER 69 different from other products?
faqs.answer: POWER 69 is the only complete 3-in-1 wellness kit addressing all dimensions of men's health — external care, internal nutrition, and traditional Ayurvedic wisdom. Our premium packaging, sourcing standards, and clinically-inspired formula set us apart from single-product solutions.

faqs.question: How do I place an order and what are the delivery options?
faqs.answer: You can order directly from our website. We offer fast shipping across India with delivery in 3-5 business days. Discreet packaging is guaranteed for your privacy. We accept Credit/Debit Cards, UPI, and Cash on Delivery.

contact.address: Power 69 Wellness Pvt. Ltd., Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
